hard_cutoff_date.description: If set, no submissions after this

after_state.description: JSON snapshot of resource after change

before_state.description: JSON snapshot of resource before change

is_sensitive.description: True for sensitive actions (billing, suspension, etc.)

invoice_id.description: If adjustment is for specific invoice

is_confidential.description: If true, not shown in student review

auto_submitted.description: True if auto-submitted on time expiry

letter_grade.description: A, B, C, D, E, F

is_public.description: true for national holidays, false for school-specific

start_time.description: Time of day (will be repeated weekly)

show_before_window.description: visible to students before availability window

class_id.description: Enrollment details - only class_id is required
